div.head: The Czechoslovak Chargé (Lípa) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
and of financial experts:
Dr. Eugen Lippansky, from the Ministry of Finance, and
Mr. Zikmund Konečný, from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

This Commission will sail for the United States from Cherbourg on the steamship Berengaria on September 26, 1925.For negotiations with the World War Foreign Debt Commission and text of agreement signed Oct. 13, 1925, see Combined Annual Reports of the World War Foreign Debt Commission, pp. 193–204.
